Package renderer.core.light

Class Lighting

java.lang.Object
renderer.core.light.Lighting
public class Lighting extends Object
The Lighting class describes a scene lighting environment.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Lighting()
    Creates a new Lighting environment.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAmbientLight(double ia)
    Adds a new ambient light source of intensity @ia to the environment.
    void
    addPointLight(double x, double y, double z, double id)
    Adds a new point light source of intensity @id at position (x, y, z) to the environment.
    double[]
    applyLights(Vector position, Vector normal, double[] color, Vector cameraPosition, double ka, double kd, double ks, double s)
    Computes the illuminated color of a 3D points of given position, normal and color, and given the camera position and material parameters.
    void
    reset()
    Reset the list of lights.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Lighting

      public Lighting()
      Creates a new Lighting environment.

  • Method Details

    • addAmbientLight

      public void addAmbientLight(double ia)
      Adds a new ambient light source of intensity @ia to the environment.
      Parameters:
      ia - the intensity of the ambient light

    • addPointLight

      public void addPointLight(double x, double y, double z, double id)
      Adds a new point light source of intensity @id at position (x, y, z) to the environment.
      Parameters:
      x - the x coordinate of the light source
      y - the y coordinate of the light source
      z - the z coordinate of the light source
      id - the intensity of the light source

    • applyLights

      public double[] applyLights(Vector position, Vector normal, double[] color, Vector cameraPosition, double ka, double kd, double ks, double s)
      Computes the illuminated color of a 3D points of given position, normal and color, and given the camera position and material parameters.
      Parameters:
      position - the position of the point in 3 coordinates
      normal - the normal at the point
      color - the color of the point
      cameraPosition - the position of the camera
      ka - the ambient reflection coefficient
      kd - the diffuse reflection coefficient
      ks - the specular reflection coefficient
      s - the shininess coefficient
      Returns:
      the illuminated color of the point as an array of 3 doubles

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Reset the list of lights.
